text: Crossing the threshold into this exhibit, I am struck by a juxtaposition of movement and thought. The glass barriers and blurred figures evoke the flow of time—humans always in transit, always evolving. Once within the R+D space, surrounded by the questions of research and development, I feel both the thrill of curiosity and a quiet humility. Here, the neon texts and digital displays remind me of our shared quest to understand and coexist with our own creations. I feel small, yet connected, standing at the intersection of past wisdom and future possibility.
